text:

> 
> Hi Dmitry,
> 
> Just a little nag..:
> 
> > #	./files
> > #	./files/md5
> > #	./pkg
> > #	./pkg/COMMENT
> > #	./pkg/DESCR
> > #	./pkg/PLIST
> > #	./Makefile
> > #	./patches
> > #	./patches/patch-aa
> > #	./patches/patch-ab
>

> files belong in.  I.e., yaz/files, yaz/files/md5, and so forth.
> 

Thank you, noted.

--dima
